Operation 'GetUser' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about what user information is returned and doesn't mention the response structure. Enhanced version specifies the return value and clarifies the operation's purpose for AI agents.

data.current_description: Allows you to get a user from the database, using the `userId` as the identifier.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a specific user's information from the License Manager database using their unique `userId`. Returns the user object containing profile details including email, name, and other user attributes. Requires appropriate License Manager permissions.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about what user information is returned and doesn't mention the response structure. Enhanced version specifies the return value and clarifies the operation's purpose for AI agents.

message: Operation 'delete_/api/license-manager/users/{userId}' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_side_effects, missing_output_details. Summary is too vague. Description lacks information about side effects (permanent deletion, removal of permissions) and response format. Enhanced version clarifies the destructive nature and irreversibility of the operation for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Allows you to delete a user from the database, using the `userId` as the identifier.
data.description_suggestion: Permanently removes a user from the License Manager database using their `userId`. This operation deletes all associated user data and access permissions. Returns a 204 No Content response on success. This action cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: Summary is too vague. Description lacks information about side effects (permanent deletion, removal of permissions) and response format. Enhanced version clarifies the destructive nature and irreversibility of the operation for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'GetListUsers' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Summary lacks specificity about pagination. Description mentions pagination mechanics but doesn't clarify what user data is returned or how to navigate pages. Enhanced version specifies return structure and pagination usage for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Returns a list of registered users. The response is divided in pages. The query parameter `numItems` defines the number of items in each page, and consequently the amount of pages for the whole list.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve paginated list of all users
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all registered users in the License Manager. Use the `numItems` query parameter to specify the number of users per page. Returns a paginated response containing user objects with their profile information. Use pagination parameters to navigate through results.
data.reasoning: Summary lacks specificity about pagination. Description mentions pagination mechanics but doesn't clarify what user data is returned or how to navigate pages. Enhanced version specifies return structure and pagination usage for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_summary: Get roles by user or appKey
data.current_description: Retrieves License Manager [roles](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/roles--7HKK5Uau2H6wxE1rH5oRbc) of a particular user or application key.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve assigned roles for user or appKey
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all License Manager roles assigned to a specific user or application key. Returns a list of role objects containing role IDs, names, and associated permissions. Useful for verifying access levels and permissions for a given user or appKey.
data.reasoning: Summary is vague about the action (retrieve vs get). Description lacks clarity about what the response contains and the practical use case. Enhanced version specifies return structure and clarifies the operation's purpose for AI agents determining access levels.

message: Operation 'GetListRoles' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Enhanced summary specifies 'paginated' and 'License Manager roles' for clarity. Description improved by clarifying what is returned (role objects with identifiers and metadata) and emphasizing pagination control, making it clearer for AI agents to understand the operation's output structure and pagination behavior.

data.current_description: Returns a list of License Manager [roles](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/roles--7HKK5Uau2H6wxE1rH5oRbc). The response is divided in pages. The query parameter `numItems` defines the number of items in each page, and consequently the amount of pages for the whole list.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve paginated list of License Manager roles
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all available License Manager roles. The response is divided into pages controlled by the `numItems` query parameter, which defines the number of items per page. Returns role objects containing role identifiers and metadata. Requires appropriate License Manager resources for access.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Enhanced summary specifies 'paginated' and 'License Manager roles' for clarity. Description improved by clarifying what is returned (role objects with identifiers and metadata) and emphasizing pagination control, making it clearer for AI agents to understand the operation's output structure and pagination behavior.

message: Operation 'Createnewappkey' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary uses abbreviated terminology. Enhanced summary uses full 'application key' terminology consistent with API context. Description was minimal; improved version clarifies what is returned (both credentials), emphasizes security considerations, explains the relationship to other operations (Update appKey), and specifies required permissions for better AI agent understanding of the operation's purpose and side effects.

data.current_description: Creates a new pair of `appKey` and `appToken`.
data.summary_suggestion: Create new application key and token pair
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new application key and token pair for programmatic authentication. Returns both the `appKey` and `appToken` credentials that must be stored securely. The generated credentials can be used for API authentication and can be managed (activated/deactivated) via the Update appKey endpoint. Requires appropriate License Manager resources.
data.reasoning: Original summary uses abbreviated terminology. Enhanced summary uses full 'application key' terminology consistent with API context. Description was minimal; improved version clarifies what is returned (both credentials), emphasizes security considerations, explains the relationship to other operations (Update appKey), and specifies required permissions for better AI agent understanding of the operation's purpose and side effects.

data.current_description: Retrieves all application keys from an account.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all application keys for account
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all application keys associated with the account. Returns a collection of application key objects containing key identifiers, creation dates, status (active/inactive), and associated metadata. Useful for auditing and managing all authentication credentials for the account. Requires appropriate License Manager resources.
data.reasoning: Original summary uses abbreviated 'appKeys' terminology. Enhanced summary uses consistent 'application keys' terminology. data.current_description: Retrieves the stores of the account and their respective hosts.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve account stores and host information
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all stores associated with the account along with their respective host configurations. Requires appropriate License Manager resources.

message: Operation 'GetAccount' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is adequate. Description needed improvement in output clarity and host-based access control context. Enhanced description specifies the return type (AccountResponse object), clarifies what data is included (account metadata, licenses, stores), and emphasizes the host-based access control requirement with clearer explanation of the restriction. This helps AI agents understand both what data is returned and the operational constraints for using this endpoint.

data.current_description:
Retrieves information from an account, such as company and sponsor user details, stores, and appTokens.

This endpoint only accepts requests from the host list designated for that store. If you want to try this request from this portal, be sure to add it to the list. Learn how to add hosts to the list in [How to manage accounts](https://help.vtex.com/en/tutorial/how-to-manage-accounts--tutorials_6285#).
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive account information including company details, sponsor user information, associated stores, and application tokens. Returns an AccountResponse object containing account metadata, license information, and store configurations. Note: This endpoint enforces host-based access control and only accepts requests from hosts designated in the account's host list. Requests from unauthorized hosts will be rejected. Requires appropriate License Manager resources.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate. Description needed improvement in output clarity and host-based access control context. Enhanced description specifies the return type (AccountResponse object), clarifies what data is included (account metadata, licenses, stores), and emphasizes the host-based access control requirement with clearer explanation of the restriction. This helps AI agents understand both what data is returned and the operational constraints for using this endpoint.
